submission.implementation_notes: Scalus 0.16.0 HTLC spending validator (`@Compile object HTLCValidator`, `Data -> Unit`). Derives FromData/ToData for HTLCDatum and HTLCRedeemer. Claim reads the upper bound of `txInfoValidRange` (finite, strictly `< timeout`); refund reads the lower bound (finite, strictly `> timeout`). Matches the production-safe convention introduced in IntersectMBO/UPLC-CAPE#170. Uses `toUplcOptimized()` with CaseConstrApply and builtin-packing; an AST-level alpha-rename pass rewrites all generated names to short purely-alphabetic identifiers (a, b, ..., z, aa, ...) before serialisation, ensuring compatibility with the plutus-core 1.45.0.0 textual parser.
